name: SmoothLife-2
description: Noise feedback — CA worms tunnel through texture
code:
// Noise feedback — CA worms tunnel through the texture
caStream('sl_worms').out(o1)

noise(3, 0.025).rotate(()=>time*0.012)
  .modulate(src(o1), 0.06)
  .modulateScale(src(o1), 0.04)
  .color(0.2, 0.45, 0.35).brightness(0.03)
  .out(o2)

src(o0)
  .modulateRotate(src(o1), 0.03)
  .blend(src(o2), 0.35)
  .modulateScale(noise(1.6, 0.03), 0.003)
  .modulateRotate(noise(0.2, 0.015), 0.003)
  .hue(()=>0.003)
  .luma(0.005, 0.06)
  .brightness(0.022)
  .saturate(1.15)
  .contrast(1.02)
  .add(src(o1).mult(src(o2)), 0.1)
  .out(o0)
